news.title:
Bank of Baroda disclosed details of 16 non-convertible bonds as of 31.03.2026.
Bonds have AAA/AA ratings with stable outlook; no defaults in redemption schedules.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda disclosed details of 16 non-convertible bonds as of 31.03.2026.
Bonds have AAA/AA ratings with stable outlook; no defaults in redemption schedules.

news.title:
SBI Securities sees strong Q4 for banks, favoring HDFC Bank, BoB, BoM, and Indian Bank.
IT sector shows limited downside; AI-driven opportunities ahead with caution on oil marketers.
news.summary:
SBI Securities sees strong Q4 for banks, favoring HDFC Bank, BoB, BoM, and Indian Bank.
IT sector shows limited downside; AI-driven opportunities ahead with caution on oil marketers.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda disclosed bonds maturing 2026-2039 with coupon rates of 7.1%-8.8%.
Total bond amounts range from ₹4,000 Cr to ₹1,00,000 Cr; some are perpetual.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda disclosed bonds maturing 2026-2039 with coupon rates of 7.1%-8.8%.
Total bond amounts range from ₹4,000 Cr to ₹1,00,000 Cr; some are perpetual.

news.title:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.
news.summary:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.

news.title:
Citi maintains Buy on Bank of Baroda with a target price of ₹360 citing 6% QoQ advances growth.
Factors include 12% YoY deposit growth, stable LDR at 83.5%, higher recoveries, tax refund, and 1.1% RoA.
news.summary:
Citi maintains Buy on Bank of Baroda with a target price of ₹360 citing 6% QoQ advances growth.
Factors include 12% YoY deposit growth, stable LDR at 83.5%, higher recoveries, tax refund, and 1.1% RoA.

news.title:
PSU banks gain investor focus post-Q4 updates; steady growth in deposits, advances seen.
BoB, PNB, Union Bank report YoY/QoQ growth; BoB dips 0.8%, PNB up 0.4%, Union Bank gains 0.6%.
news.summary:
PSU banks gain investor focus post-Q4 updates; steady growth in deposits, advances seen.
BoB, PNB, Union Bank report YoY/QoQ growth; BoB dips 0.8%, PNB up 0.4%, Union Bank gains 0.6%.

news.title:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.
news.summary:
Banking stocks, including HDFC Bank, Yes Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank, IDBI Bank, Union Bank of India, and Bank of Baroda, will be in focus due to Q4 FY26 updates.
HDFC Bank posted 10-12% growth in advances and 12.8% deposit rise; Yes Bank, IDBI Bank, and Kotak showed double-digit growth in key metrics.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda announced changes in senior management per SEBI LODR norms.
Mr. Nema Rakesh and Mr. Singh Sanjay Kumar appointed as CGM IT Ops and Official Languages Head.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda announced changes in senior management per SEBI LODR norms.
Mr. Nema Rakesh and Mr. Singh Sanjay Kumar appointed as CGM IT Ops and Official Languages Head.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda's global business grew 13.9% YoY to ₹30.79T as of Mar 2026.
Global advances rose 16.2% YoY to ₹14.3T; deposits increased 12% YoY to ₹16.49T.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda's global business grew 13.9% YoY to ₹30.79T as of Mar 2026.
Global advances rose 16.2% YoY to ₹14.3T; deposits increased 12% YoY to ₹16.49T.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda received INR 806.2 crore tax demand from FAU on March 30, 2026.
Disclosure made under LODR guidelines as per exchange filing by the Bank.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda received INR 806.2 crore tax demand from FAU on March 30, 2026.
Disclosure made under LODR guidelines as per exchange filing by the Bank.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda resolved the MP govt fund transfer issue swiftly.
The temporary debarment was lifted within 24 hours with no operational impact.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda resolved the MP govt fund transfer issue swiftly.
The temporary debarment was lifted within 24 hours with no operational impact.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda infused ₹500 Cr into subsidiary BOB Securities & Giltedge Ltd.
The move aligns with BoB's focus on strengthening its subsidiaries per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda infused ₹500 Cr into subsidiary BOB Securities & Giltedge Ltd.
The move aligns with BoB's focus on strengthening its subsidiaries per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda received a ₹457.3 crore tax demand notice for AY 2019-20.
The bank is appealing the order and expects no financial impact currently.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda received a ₹457.3 crore tax demand notice for AY 2019-20.
The bank is appealing the order and expects no financial impact currently.

news.title:
Madhya Pradesh bans Bank of Baroda over Rs 1,751 crore CM Kisan Yojana fund lapse.
The order was revoked within 24 hours due to a wrong treasury head for deposit.
news.summary:
Madhya Pradesh bans Bank of Baroda over Rs 1,751 crore CM Kisan Yojana fund lapse.
The order was revoked within 24 hours due to a wrong treasury head for deposit.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda received GBP 75M from its UK subsidiary on 27.03.2026.
The transaction is a capital reduction repatriation per SEBI transparency rules.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda received GBP 75M from its UK subsidiary on 27.03.2026.
The transaction is a capital reduction repatriation per SEBI transparency rules.

news.title:
Bank stocks fell 2%, ending a 2-day rise; Canara Bank dropped 4%.
HDFC Bank fell 2% amid reports of leadership disputes; PSU Bank index dropped 3%.
news.summary:
Bank stocks fell 2%, ending a 2-day rise; Canara Bank dropped 4%.
HDFC Bank fell 2% amid reports of leadership disputes; PSU Bank index dropped 3%.

news.title:
Anil Ambani seeks SBI & BoB-led panel for structured debt resolution citing legal precedents and repayment history.
Ambani proposes a meeting to advance discussions, referencing past insolvency resolutions and seeking Finance Minister's support.
news.summary:
Anil Ambani seeks SBI & BoB-led panel for structured debt resolution citing legal precedents and repayment history.
Ambani proposes a meeting to advance discussions, referencing past insolvency resolutions and seeking Finance Minister's support.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda ordered to pay Rs 3.28L for failing to reverse a failed Rs 10K ATM withdrawal.
The issue persisted for nearly nine years before a Surat consumer court's ruling.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda ordered to pay Rs 3.28L for failing to reverse a failed Rs 10K ATM withdrawal.
The issue persisted for nearly nine years before a Surat consumer court's ruling.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, BOB Securities & Giltedge Ltd.
The subsidiary will undertake Standalone Primary Dealership business per RBI guidelines.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, BOB Securities & Giltedge Ltd.
The subsidiary will undertake Standalone Primary Dealership business per RBI guidelines.

news.title:
Bank of Baroda fined Rs. 1 lakh by RBI for note shortage in remittance.
Penalty to impact profit & loss; disclosure submitted to stock exchanges.
news.summary:
Bank of Baroda fined Rs. 1 lakh by RBI for note shortage in remittance.
Penalty to impact profit & loss; disclosure submitted to stock exchanges.
